name: Chicken Liver and Spaghetti Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer hamburger, onions, green pepper and oil until meat has lost red color.
2. Sieve tomatoes and add with tomato paste and seasonings. Cover and simmer for 1 hour.
3. Simmer livers and butter for 10 minutes and add to meat mixture.
4. Cook spaghetti, drain and place in a 2 quart dish.
5. Pour on meat sauce and toss lightly.
6. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
